final:
module packet_filter (
    input [31:0] blocked_ip,
    input [31:0] allowed_ip_1,
    input [31:0] allowed_ip_2,
    input [31:0] allowed_ip_3,
    output reg allowed
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (blocked_ip == allowed_ip_1 || blocked_ip == allowed_ip_2 || blocked_ip == allowed_ip_3) 
            allowed = 1'b1; // Allowed
        else 
            allowed = 1'b0; // Blocked
    end
endmodule
